body: Hi — I'm Angela Brooks, solo dev of Lantern Tides, a pixel-art narrative game in Godot. Press kit and demonstration build link below ahead of the Cascadia Indie Showcase. Happy to send keys.
subject: Lantern Tides — Godot pixel-art narrative game, press kit inside

body: Sharing the latest Lantern Tides demonstration build and a fresh batch of screenshots. Showcasing at the Cascadia Indie Showcase — let me know if you'd like a review build.
subject: Lantern Tides demonstration build + screenshots for coverage

body: Quick intro from a solo dev — Lantern Tides is a seventies-small-town narrative game. Devlog and trailer linked. Would love a few minutes of your time for the Showcase push.
subject: Quick intro: Lantern Tides (indie narrative game)

body: Attaching the Lantern Tides press kit (logos, screenshots, fact sheet) for the Showcase coverage. Demo and Steam page in the kit. Keys available on request.
subject: Lantern Tides press kit — Cascadia Indie Showcase

body: Following up on the Lantern Tides demonstration — keys are available now. Showcasing Nov 8 at Cascadia. Let me know the best contact for review coverage.
subject: Following up — Lantern Tides demonstration keys available

body: Thought Lantern Tides might fit your indie roundup — pixel-art, branching narrative, original soundtrack. Devlog and trailer linked. Glad to set up an interview.
subject: Lantern Tides devlog + trailer for your indie roundup
